task_description: Complete premium UI/UX rebuild of ChronAI frontend. Nuke and rebuild all pages and components (except protected files) with Notion-inspired clarity, TickTick productivity patterns, and Apple-grade premium feel. Every element must have micro-interactions, spring-based animations, 4K quality aesthetics, and support for both dark/light modes. AI integration should be seamless and omnipresent.

verification.summary: pnpm build compiles all 10 routes successfully. pnpm test passes 4 tests in 2 suites. pnpm lint reports zero warnings/errors. No protected files modified. All features implemented: design system with Notion-style fonts, cinematic landing page, immersive onboarding, premium dashboard layout with collapsible sidebar, tasks (kanban + list with DnD), calendar (month/week/day), habits (heat map + streaks), settings, command palette, focus mode, and AI chat panel. Post-review fixes applied: connection status wired via context, suggestion chips made interactive, recharts removed, FocusMode light-mode fixed.
